ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the game (e.g., 6 innings, 7 innings) */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "RBIs" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
column_names: ID of the tournament the game belongs to
Date and time of the game
Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie)
Format of the game (e.g., 6 innings, 7 innings)
Number of hits in the game
Number of errors in the game
Number of strikeouts in the game
